payload.evidence: The locally implementable Phase 7 execution candidate passed checksum/platform preflight, signed test-fixture install/update/scaffold, all-six-command ten-fixture normalized equivalence, focused build/release/workflow regressions, and framework-only Phase 6 verification. The no-trust premerge gate passed Phases 1-4, then stopped at the required external Phase 5 trust boundary. No remote five-runner or PowerShell execution occurred; artifact provenance, safe Windows mutation, Phase 6 live P0-P7, platform acceptance, Phase 7 acceptance, tag, publish, signing, promotion, and Phase 8 remain pending or blocked.

payload.actions_taken: ["ran required bootstrap and preserved the pre-existing Symphony ownership refusal","implemented executable self-digest and native-platform preflight","implemented external signed-payload and independent trust adapters","implemented checksum-first Bash and PowerShell V1 installers","implemented the six-command ten-fixture execution runner schema and verifier","wired exact-five normalized workflow collection with immutable feature-branch diagnostics","ran focused Phase 7 and broad local validation"]
payload.decisions_made: ["retain exactly six V1 core commands and four separate bridge commands","use checksum verification only for executable byte authentication and explicitly label provenance unattested","materialize signed test payload and trust input outside target repositories","keep non-Unix safe repository mutation controlled-unsupported","allow agent-branch diagnostics only when candidate workflow and dispatch SHAs are identical","leave US-112 in progress with every proof flag zero and all release authorities blocked"]
payload.errors: ["bootstrap refused the pre-existing Symphony-owned authoritative state and no local harness-cli was created","the first execution run used a raw path-ledger digest instead of canonical JSON","the first scaffold case used a destination different from the signed exact destination","the first recovery adversary expected conflict exit 4 instead of contracted invalid exit 3"]
payload.harness_friction: The required bootstrap cannot restore the verified core epoch because the pre-existing authoritative database contains Symphony-owned stories, so matrix queries and CLI-authored durable records were unavailable. This continuation preserved that state and added one exact replayable changeset instead of initializing, deleting, or rewriting Symphony data.
payload.notes: Detailed trace for the locally implementable Phase 7 execution slice. Duration and token estimates are unavailable because the session does not expose stable end-to-end measurements. The PowerShell path is locally source-checked and wired to Windows CI but has not executed; no push, dispatch, tag, release, publish, signing, attestation, promotion, main-branch mutation, or Phase 8 action occurred.
payload.task_summary: Completed the locally implementable Phase 7 authenticated execution proof slice without platform acceptance or promotion
